description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 70% cotton and 30% polyester, has a round neck, short sleeves, rubber and metallic print on the front and printed logo on left chestFitComfortWash careGentle machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, dry clean, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsIf you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better way than with this black T-shirt from adidas. Designed for the fashion conscious, this round neck tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a perfect fit. Wear it to the gym or the Sports club, or simply pair it with jeans and casual footwear for that cool look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
